problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Combining Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
